# unit

**Instance Property**

The linguistic unit that this tokenizer uses.

## Declaration

```swift
var unit: NLTokenUnit { get }
```

## Configuring a tokenizer

- **string**: The text to be tokenized.
- **setLanguage(_:)**: Sets the language of the text to be tokenized.
- **NLTokenizer.Attributes**: Hints about the contents of the string for the tokenizer.

items.description: Sets the language of the text to be tokenized.
